entry.title: New: RES24-264 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRAVEL AND RELATED EXPENSES, VALUED AT $1,750, TO THE CITY FROM THE AMERICAN ASSOCIATION OF MOTOR VEHICLE ADMINISTRATORS ("AAMVA") FOR THE PROGRAM ADMINISTRATORS OF THE DEPARTMENT OF CUSTOMER SERVICES TO ATTEND THE ANNUAL REGION 4 CHIEF ADMINISTRATORS AND LAW ENFORCEMENT OFFICIALS MEETING IN LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA, FROM DECEMBER 3-4, 2024.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
